description: no output flag - pdf must not appear next to input
short flag -o - pdf must appear at specified path
long flag --output - pdf must appear at specified path
equals syntax --output= - pdf must appear at specified path
unicode arrows ▼ ▲ - pdf must be produced without LaTeX error
missing input file - must exit with error before invoking docker
no -o flag - pdf must appear next to input with same basename
